languages.original_text: "Multiplying suffering and opposing transcendental entropy with violence, I suppose. I would be lying if I said I did not wish to observe it, but my mind as yet retains a sense of self-preservation."

languages.text: "Умножение страданий и противостояние трансцендентальной энтропии с помощью насилия, полагаю. Я изреку ложь, если скажу, что не хотел бы это лицезреть, но чувство самосохранения все же присуще моему разуму".
"Multiplying suffering and opposing transcendental entropy with violence, I suppose. I would be lying if I said I did not wish to observe it, but my mind as yet retains a sense of self-preservation."
languages.original_text: "Умножение страданий и противостояние трансцендентальной энтропии с помощью насилия, полагаю. Я изреку ложь, если скажу, что не хотел бы это лицезреть, но чувство самосохранения все же присуще моему разуму".

traits.locale_text: "Multiplying suffering and opposing transcendental entropy with violence, I suppose. I would be lying if I said I did not wish to observe it, but my mind as yet retains a sense of self-preservation."
"Multiplying suffering and opposing transcendental entropy with violence, I suppose. I would be lying if I said I did not wish to observe it, but my mind as yet retains a sense of self-preservation."
"Multiplying suffering and opposing transcendental entropy with violence, I suppose. I would be lying if I said I did not wish to observe it, but my mind as yet retains a sense of self-preservation."

languages.text: «Multiplicando el sufrimiento y rechazando la entropía trascendental mediante la violencia, supongo. Mentiría si dijera que no deseo observarla, pero mi mente aún mantiene el sentido de la supervivencia».
languages.original_text: "Multiplying suffering and opposing transcendental entropy with violence, I suppose. I would be lying if I said I did not wish to observe it, but my mind as yet retains a sense of self-preservation."

traits.locale_text: «Multiplicando el sufrimiento y rechazando la entropía trascendental mediante la violencia, supongo. Mentiría si dijera que no deseo observarla, pero mi mente aún mantiene el sentido de la supervivencia».

languages.text: 「苦痛を増幅させ、超越的エントロピーに暴力で対抗する、といったところでしょうか。それを観察したくないと言えば嘘になりますが、私の精神は今なお、自己保存の感覚を保っています」
languages.original_text: "Multiplying suffering and opposing transcendental entropy with violence, I suppose. I would be lying if I said I did not wish to observe it, but my mind as yet retains a sense of self-preservation."

traits.locale_text: 「苦痛を増幅させ、超越的エントロピーに暴力で対抗する、といったところでしょうか。それを観察したくないと言えば嘘になりますが、私の精神は今なお、自己保存の感覚を保っています」

languages.text: “我猜想是用暴力来加倍痛苦，以对抗先验熵增。如果我说自己不愿得见这一幕，那就是在撒谎。但我的心智尚存一丝自我保护意识。”
languages.original_text: "Multiplying suffering and opposing transcendental entropy with violence, I suppose. I would be lying if I said I did not wish to observe it, but my mind as yet retains a sense of self-preservation."

traits.locale_text: “我猜想是用暴力来加倍痛苦，以对抗先验熵增。如果我说自己不愿得见这一幕，那就是在撒谎。但我的心智尚存一丝自我保护意识。”

languages.text: "Vielfaches Leid und die Begegnung transzendentaler Entropie mit Gewalt, nehme ich an. Ich würde lügen, wenn ich sagte, ich würde das nicht gerne untersuchen, aber noch hat mein Verstand einen gewissen Selbstschutz."
languages.original_text: "Multiplying suffering and opposing transcendental entropy with violence, I suppose. I would be lying if I said I did not wish to observe it, but my mind as yet retains a sense of self-preservation."

traits.locale_text: "Vielfaches Leid und die Begegnung transzendentaler Entropie mit Gewalt, nehme ich an. Ich würde lügen, wenn ich sagte, ich würde das nicht gerne untersuchen, aber noch hat mein Verstand einen gewissen Selbstschutz."

languages.text: « La multiplication des souffrances et la violence comme réponse à l'entropie transcendantale... Je mentirais si je disais ne pas m'y intéresser, mais je garde encore un instinct d'autopréservation. »
languages.original_text: "Multiplying suffering and opposing transcendental entropy with violence, I suppose. I would be lying if I said I did not wish to observe it, but my mind as yet retains a sense of self-preservation."

traits.locale_text: « La multiplication des souffrances et la violence comme réponse à l'entropie transcendantale... Je mentirais si je disais ne pas m'y intéresser, mais je garde encore un instinct d'autopréservation. »

languages.text: "Acıyı çoğaltmak ve aşkın entropiye şiddetle karşı çıkmak sanırım. Bunu gözlemlemek istemediğimi söylersem yalan söylemiş olurum ama zihnim hâlâ bir kendini koruma güdüsüne sahip."
languages.original_text: "Multiplying suffering and opposing transcendental entropy with violence, I suppose. I would be lying if I said I did not wish to observe it, but my mind as yet retains a sense of self-preservation."
